title: Maximum Subarray (Kadane's Algorithm)
coreIdea: Find the contiguous subarray with the maximum sum by tracking a running sum, resetting it whenever it becomes negative (since a negative running sum only hurts future sums), and tracking the max sum seen.
recognitionCues: asks for maximum sum of a contiguous subarray
approach: Track current_sum and max_sum, both initialized to the first element. For each subsequent element, current_sum = max(element, current_sum + element), then max_sum = max(max_sum, current_sum).
